_fixture.description: Transitional state — degraded. Signer crashed before recovering the verification reference. Effect may have crossed the boundary but the signer has nothing to hand off. The honest record is: 'I started, I do not know if it landed, I have nothing to hand off.' This is a different quality of not-knowing than FAILED — execution may have succeeded. Externally unverifiable without operator logs.

_verify.note: tx_hash is null — signer crashed before recovering verification handle. Distinguish from FAILED: PENDING/null means execution started, outcome unknown. FAILED means execution did not complete or post-execution receipt never arrived.
